surfaces.cards: Flat solid background with 1px subtle border (#e2e8f0), no default shadow. On active/hover: slight shadow-sm.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: bg-white/80, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border-border/40. No complete transparent background.
surfaces.bottom_tab: Solid white background, 1px top border, safe area padding at bottom.

visual_enhancers.textures: None required. Clean, clinical, and authoritative financial feel.

alignment.text: left-aligned for all dense content and readable paragraphs
alignment.icons: optical alignment (adjust padding when icons are paired with text)

motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on all tap targets. Subtle scale down (scale-95) on active state.
motion.transitions: transition-transform duration-200 ease-out, transition-colors duration-200 ease-out
motion.page_transitions: Slide-in from right for new screens, fade-in for tabs.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text and 3:1 for large text. Use #1e293b for primary text over light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary/50) for keyboard navigation if adapted to web.
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='home-tab-button').

action_card.description: Used for 'Cosa devo fare adesso?' section. High visibility, clear CTA.
action_card.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden

deadline_widget.description: Tax deadline item with color-coded urgency.
deadline_widget.classes: flex items-center gap-4 p-4 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl bg-white

bottom_navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-200 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-between

ticket_item.classes: p-4 border-b border-slate-100 last:border-0 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors

icons_library.style: Duotone or Regular weight, providing a premium, polished look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first web app mimicking a React Native app structure using React, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI.
Use Phosphor Icons for a clean, professional aesthetic.
Ensure the 'Cosa devo fare adesso?' widget is prominently placed on the Home screen.
Strictly exclude any 'Da pagare' sections and document upload functionalities.
Implement a dedicated Tax Calendar ('Scadenze') view.
Use #3caca4 as the primary interactive color but do not overuse it as a background. Use it for CTAs, active tab indicators, and progress bars.
Add an empty state for the Documents section clearly indicating they are for read-only consultation.
All tap targets must be large and accessible.
Include 'Benvenuto, [Nome Cliente]' dynamically in the header.
universal_guidelines: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or rounded-full for mobile apps).
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
DO NOT use emojis as icons.
